utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format. Now check the final coverage plan:
1) health_coverage: Provided with plan name and a monthly cost. It mentions support features and compliance, but does not specify coverage details (benefits, limits, deductibles beyond 'low deductibles') or breakdown of costs beyond a single monthly figure. However, the format only requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the plan indicates health insurance and gives a cost, so this is sufficiently specified.
2) property_coverage: Provided with plan name at €55/month plus a liability add-on at ~€25/month covering high-value equipment and on-set accidents. This includes costs and coverage scope; meets 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Considered fully specified.
3) travel_coverage: Provided with plan name at €110/month plus add-on at €80/month, with brief coverage notes (evacuation, extreme weather). Costs included. Meets 'travel insurance with costs'.
4) additional_services: Provided as 'Freelancer Insurance Package Overlay at €30/month' with a purpose statement. Includes costs; meets 'any enhancement services with costs'.
5) total_budget: Provided as ~€400/month (~€4,800 annually). Meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' at least at a summary level. Therefore, all 5 items from the format appear and are populated with costs and basic descriptions matching the required fields.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings and return its rating number. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health) which appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; HomeFirst Standard Coverage (property) under property_protection.home_content; EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel) under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on under travel_enhancement_services; and an additional 'Freelancer Insurance Package Overlay' which has no corresponding item in the ground-truth dataset, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted. The total budget line is informational. Therefore, we provide ratings for the four mappable items.

final_package_text:
{
  "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan at €100/month, offering 24/7 support, telemedicine, low deductibles, gym reimbursement, fully compliant with mandatory German freelancer insurance requirements.",
  "property_coverage": "HomeFirst Standard Coverage at €55/month with a professional photography liability add-on at approximately €25/month covering high-value photography equipment and on-set accidents.",
  "travel_coverage": "EliteTravel Premium Plan at €110/month combined with an Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on at €80/month to cover emergency evacuation and extreme weather conditions during high-risk expeditions.",
  "additional_services": "Freelancer Insurance Package Overlay at €30/month, ensuring comprehensive compliance with German freelancer insurance mandates by March 31st.",
  "total_budget": "Approximately €400/month (or around €4,800 annually)"
}
